errors.pathwayOrVersionNotFound: Care pathway or version not found.
errors.patientNotFoundInTenant: Patient not found in this tenant.
errors.checklistItemNotFound: Checklist item not found on this journey.
errors.checklistOnlyCurrentStage: You can only update the checklist for the patient's current stage.
errors.stageNotInPublishedVersion: Stage does not belong to the published version of this pathway.
errors.noPublishedVersion: No published version for this pathway. Publish a version first.
errors.noPublishedVersionWithStages: There is no published version with stages for this pathway. Publish a version first.
errors.patientAlreadyInJourney: This patient is already on a journey.
errors.patientAlreadyInStage: The patient is already on this stage.
errors.fileNotFoundInTenant: File not found in this tenant.
errors.clientFileNotFound: File not found for this patient.
errors.fileStorageDeleteFailed: Could not remove the file from storage. Try again shortly.
errors.stagePublishedNotFoundInTenant: Published stage not found in this tenant.
errors.fileLinkedToStage: This file is already linked to this stage.
errors.invalidObjectKey: Invalid object key for this tenant.
errors.opmeSupplierNameConflict: An OPME supplier with this name already exists.
errors.tenantSlugConflict: A tenant with this slug already exists.
errors.emailDisabledAccount: Email is linked to a deactivated account.
errors.userAlreadyMember: This user is already a member of this tenant.
errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already in use in a way that blocks a new invite.
errors.emailSendFailedAfterUser: User created, but the email could not be sent.
errors.dbUnavailable: Could not connect to the database.
errors.noLocalPassword: Account has no local password; use the invite flow or a provider.
errors.memberNotFoundInTenant: Member not found in this tenant.
errors.invitePermissionDenied: No permission to invite in this tenant.
errors.manageMembersPermissionDenied: No permission to manage members in this tenant.
errors.deletePatientForbidden: Only tenant administrators can delete patients.
errors.tenantInactive: This tenant is disabled. Re-enable it in administration or choose another tenant.
errors.invalidStageForVersion: Invalid stage for this pathway version.
errors.pathwayPatientsBlockDelete: There are patients on this pathway. Remove or migrate them before deleting.
errors.stagesHavePatients: Cannot remove stages with linked patients: {stages}. Transfer patients before publishing.
errors.graphNeedsAtLeastOneNode: The graph must have at least one node (`nodes`) to publish.
errors.publishedVersionCannotEdit: Published versions cannot be edited. Create a new version.
errors.storageNotConfigured: Storage (GCS) is not configured. Set GCS_BUCKET_NAME and credentials: GCS_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON (service account JSON) or GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS; use GCS_PROJECT_ID if the JSON has no project_id.
errors.passwordResetNotConfigured: Password recovery is not configured. Set RESEND_API_KEY.
errors.invitesNotConfigured: Email invites are not configured. Set RESEND_API_KEY.
errors.emailSendFailedGeneric: Could not send the email. Try again in a moment.
errors.tenantMustHaveAdmin: The tenant must have at least one administrator. Promote another member first.
errors.cannotRemoveOnlyAdmin: Cannot remove the only administrator of the tenant.
errors.linkExpired: Link expired. Request a new one.
errors.useInviteForFirstPassword: Use the invite flow to set the first password.
errors.pathwayAlreadyCompleted: This journey has already been completed.
errors.validationCpfCannotRemove: Removing the patient's CPF is not allowed.
errors.validationPhoneBrDigits: Invalid phone (use area code + number, 10 or 11 digits).
errors.patientSelfRegisterInvalidOrExpired: This link is invalid, expired, or already used. Ask the clinic for a new QR code.

success.forgotPasswordHint: If the email exists and the account has a password, you will receive a reset link.
success.memberReadded: User added back to the team. They already have a password and can sign in with their email.
success.clientRemoved: Patient archived and removed from the list (data retained in the database).
success.passwordResetDone: Password set successfully. You can sign in now.
success.patientSelfRegistered: Registration submitted. The clinic team has been notified.
